title: H-Index II
hints: The sorted order allows skipping large portions of the array. What property of the h-index relates the number of papers to their citation counts?
Use binary search to find the largest h. The key is comparing citations[i] with the number of papers from index i to the end.
At index i, the count of papers with at least citations[i] citations is n - i. Find the largest i where citations[i] >= n - i.
